Custom Colors Available — We can produce lockers in any Wilsonart® laminate color to match your team branding. Custom colors require 8–12 week lead time.

Digital representation may vary from actual product. Please request a Wilsonart® sample chip to confirm your color selection. Standard colors ship in 2–4 weeks. All laminates feature AEON™ Enhanced Scratch & Scuff-Resistant Technology. Matching edgeband available for all colors.
